subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, thou pure and blessed leaf! Thou hast mentioned thy brother who hath striven in the path of God, and thy father [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله الورقه الطیبه الزکیه قد ذکرت اخاک الذی سعی فی سبیل الله و اباک
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @love of God
